================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Business Cards for Professional Networking & Marketing

High-Quality Paper Business Card Printing with Same-Day Rush Options

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options Paper Coating (Matte or Gloss) Quantity Production Time Upload Design Files Professional Design Service PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Business Card Printing with Premium Paper & Coating Options

Create lasting professional impressions with our custom business card printing service. Our business cards are digitally printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper, delivering exceptional quality for networking events, trade shows, and everyday business interactions.

Choose from glossy or matte coating finishes to match your brand aesthetic. Our professional printing process ensures crisp text, vibrant colors, and consistent quality across your entire order.

Key Features:

  • Premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper
  • Digital printing for sharp detail and color accuracy
  • Choice of glossy or matte coating finish
  • Rush production options available (1-5 business days)
  • Professional design assistance available
  • Color matching proof system for critical projects

Note: Professional design services are available at $60 per hour for custom business card creation and optimization.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Paper & Coating Options for Business Card Printing

Our business cards are printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper, providing the perfect balance of durability and professional feel for networking and marketing applications.

Paper Specifications

  • Weight: 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock
  • Finish Options: Glossy or Matte coating
  • Printing Method: High-quality digital printing
  • Durability: Professional-grade paper stock for frequent handling

Coating Finish Options

Glossy Coating: Provides vibrant color reproduction and a premium, polished appearance ideal for photography and colorful designs.

Matte Coating: Offers an elegant, non-reflective finish that's easy to write on and provides a sophisticated, understated look.

Both coating options provide protection against wear and fingerprints while maintaining excellent print quality throughout the life of your business cards.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Business Cards

Our business card finishing options are designed to create the perfect professional impression for your networking and marketing needs.

Standard Finishing

  • Size: Standard US business card dimensions
  • Cutting: Precision cut to standard specifications
  • Edges: Clean, straight cuts for professional appearance

Coating Application

Glossy Finish: Applied for enhanced color vibrancy and protection against handling wear.

Matte Finish: Applied for sophisticated appearance and writeable surface area.

Quality Control

Every business card order undergoes comprehensive quality inspection to ensure consistent color, proper cutting, and coating application before shipping.

For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System provides precise color verification before full production begins.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Card Production & Rush Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production timeframes to meet your business networking and marketing deadlines, from same-day rush orders to cost-effective standard production.

1 Business Day Priority

Perfect for urgent networking events and last-minute business meetings. Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day. Same-day emergency rushes available in select cases.

2 Business Days Express

Ideal when you need professional business cards quickly but have an extra day for production. Orders received after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day.

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production option, offering the best balance of speed and value. Perfect for most business card orders with moderate timing requirements.

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for advance planning. Choose this timeframe when you're ordering ahead for upcoming networking events or marketing campaigns.

Important Notes:

  • Production time begins after file upload completion and approval
  • Orders flagged in prepress or requiring proof approval start production after final approval
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
  • Emergency same-day rushes available - contact customer service for availability
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Card Payment & Ordering Options

We provide secure, flexible payment options for your custom business card orders, ensuring smooth processing for your professional printing needs.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received before production begins

Payment Processing

All business cards require payment prior to production start. Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your order details.

For check payments, orders enter production only after check receipt and clearance. This ensures your business cards are produced according to your exact specifications.

Order Approval Process

Every business card order includes a review process where you can verify design details, quantity, and specifications before final production authorization and payment processing.

For detailed information about check payment processing and timelines, reference our comprehensive payment guidelines.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Business Card Orders

We provide reliable shipping solutions to ensure your professional business cards arrive on time for networking events, trade shows, and business meetings.

Standard Shipping Information

  • Default Method: UPS Ground (unless specified otherwise)
  • Coverage: 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of United States
  • Tracking: Provided once package ships
  • Pricing: Based on package weight and destination

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard Ground: 3-5 Business Days
  • Three Day: 3 Business Days
  • Two Day: 2 Business Days
  • Overnight: 1 Business Day
  • UPS Overnight AM: Next business day morning delivery

Production Location

Standard business cards are produced exclusively at our Minnesota facility, ensuring consistent quality control and reliable shipping timeframes.

Important Shipping Notes

  • Large orders may incur additional shipping charges
  • Economy shipping adds 5-10 days depending on location
  • International orders require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation
  • Damaged shipments require return of goods before replacement processing

For specific shipping questions or requirements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Networking & Marketing Uses for Business Cards

Custom business cards serve as essential tools for professional networking, brand building, and marketing across various business applications.

Networking Applications

  • Professional Conferences: Exchange contact information with industry professionals and potential clients
  • Trade Shows: Distribute brand information and contact details at booth visits and networking sessions
  • Business Meetings: Leave professional contact information after client presentations and partnership discussions
  • Networking Events: Share contact details at chamber of commerce meetings and professional mixers

Marketing & Promotional Uses

  • Service Promotion: Include QR codes or special offers to drive business engagement
  • Brand Building: Reinforce company branding with consistent design and messaging
  • Customer Follow-up: Provide easy reference for customers to reconnect after service calls
  • Referral Programs: Include referral information to encourage word-of-mouth marketing

Industry-Specific Applications

Sales Professionals: Essential for client relationship building and follow-up communications.

Service Industries: Provide contact information for scheduling and emergency services.

Creative Professionals: Showcase design aesthetic while providing portfolio and contact information.

Healthcare Providers: Share appointment scheduling and contact information with patients.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Card Design & Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your business cards print with professional quality and accurate color reproduction for networking and marketing applications.

Recommended File Formats

  • Vector Files: .eps format with fonts converted to outlines (best print quality)
  • High-Resolution PDFs: Print-ready with embedded fonts and proper color profiles
  • High-Resolution Images: .jpg files with minimum 300 DPI resolution

Design Guidelines

  • Resolution: Minimum 300 DPI for crisp text and image reproduction
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate print color matching
  • Bleed Area: Include proper bleed margins for full-coverage designs
  • Font Requirements: Convert text to outlines or embed fonts in PDF files

Professional Design Assistance

Our experienced graphic designers provide professional business card design services to ensure your cards make the best possible impression. Design assistance includes layout optimization, color correction, and brand consistency verification.

Color Matching Services

For color-critical business card projects, our Color Match Proof System provides precise color verification before production. This service ensures brand colors match exactly across your entire order.

If you're unsure about your file quality or need design improvements, our professional graphic design team is available to optimize your business card artwork for the best possible printing results.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Business Cards for Professional Networking Today

Ready to make lasting professional impressions? Our custom business card printing service delivers premium quality cards that represent your brand with excellence at every networking opportunity.

With same-day rush options available, you never have to miss an important meeting or networking event. Choose from our flexible production timeframes and premium paper options to create business cards that truly represent your professional brand.

Why Choose Our Business Card Printing Service

  • Premium Quality: 12.4 pt coverstock with professional coating options
  • Fast Turnaround: Same-day rush production available for urgent needs
  • Professional Design: Expert graphic design assistance for optimal results
  • Reliable Delivery: Comprehensive shipping options with tracking included
  • Quality Guarantee: Rigorous quality control ensures consistent, professional results

Unmatched Customer Service

Our experienced customer service team provides personalized support throughout your business card ordering process. From design consultation to production updates, we're here to ensure your custom business cards exceed your professional expectations.

Contact our team at (320) 391-5300 for personalized assistance with rush orders, design questions, or custom requirements for your business card printing project.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business Card Printing FAQ

What is the standard business card size in the US?

Standard US business cards measure 3.5" x 2" and are printed on premium 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper with your choice of glossy or matte coating finish.

What's the difference between matte and gloss business cards?

Glossy business cards provide vibrant color reproduction and a premium, polished appearance ideal for colorful designs and photography. Matte business cards offer an elegant, non-reflective finish that's easy to write on and provides a sophisticated, professional look.

How thick are your business cards?

Our business cards are printed on 12.4 pt, 120 lb. coverstock paper, providing substantial thickness and professional feel for networking and business applications while maintaining durability for frequent handling.

How do I design a business card?

You can upload your own print-ready design files or take advantage of our professional design services. We recommend vector-based files (.eps with outlined fonts) or high-resolution PDFs. Our graphic designers are available at $60 per hour for custom business card creation and optimization.

What information should I include on a business card?

Essential business card information includes your name, job title, company name, phone number, email address, and website. Consider adding your company logo, physical address (if relevant), and social media handles. Keep the design clean and readable for maximum networking effectiveness.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
